name: Central Scrutinizer
description: Browser-based device manager for handheld launchers, letting users manage their devices from web or mobile browsers with library browsing, file tools, logs, artwork replacement, and optional background mode.
author: helaas

changelog.v0.1.6: Custom ROM folders now appear in the library when the matching emulator pak is installed. Platforms page stream-loads for snappier startup, with incremental card rendering, a loading skeleton, and a fallback icon for unknown platforms.
changelog.v0.1.5: Add server-backed Name/Size/Modified sorting for paginated browser tables with accessible headers. Thanks @ericreinsmidt.
changelog.v0.1.4: Add folder and ZIP uploads with extraction modes, conflict previews, and safer partial-upload handling.
changelog.v0.1.3: Properly handle large folders in the browser, add pagination system.
changelog.v0.1.2: Adds multi-select file actions, drag-to-move support, clearer auto-dismissing browser notices, mobile layout refinements, and safer rename fallback handling.
changelog.v0.1.1: Small bug fixes and improvements to the experience on mobile browsers.
changelog.v0.1.0: Initial release with a browser-based dashboard for managing paired devices from desktop or mobile browsers, plus platform library browsing, save-state management, file tools, logs, Mac dot cleanup, optional terminal access, and background mode.
